results.title: OSL Indonesia Completes Transition to ICEX Group, Marking Continued Development of Indonesia's Integrated Digital Asset Market Infrastructure
results.description: JAKARTA, Indonesia, May 18, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- On May 12, ICEX Group announced that PT Multikripto Exchange Indonesia (OSL Indonesia) has officially completed its transition process and effectively joined the ICEX Group ecosystem as of May 7, 2026. OSL Indonesia was previously a member...

results.title: Hackers access GitHub and download codebase in Grafana Labs breach
results.description: The hackers have since demanded a ransom payment from Grafana Labs, to prevent the release of its codebase. Read more: Hackers access GitHub and download codebase in Grafana Labs breach
